title: Auto Light Control Unit Input Inspection

crossRefs.label: Disconnect the auto light control unit 7P coupler.

blocks.text: Auto Light Control Unit Input Inspection
Check for blown relay box No. A14 (10A) and sub-fuse/relay box No. D1 (15A) fuses and connections before performing the inspection.
1. Disconnect the auto light control unit 7P coupler.

refs.label: Disconnect the auto light control unit 7P coupler.

blocks.text: 2. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace the auto light control unit.

refs.label: Replace the auto light control unit.

rows.text: inspection terminal
Wiring color
Measuring conditions
result
Inspection items in case of abnormality
black
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
yellow
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Fuse Box Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
green
Disconnect the auto A/C control unit (32P) coupler.
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the No.19 terminal of the auto A/C control unit (32P) coupler.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
green
Disconnect the auto A/C control unit (32P) coupler.
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the No. 29 terminal of the auto A/C control unit (32P) coupler.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
red
Fuse box Remove coupler R (28P)
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the No. 19 terminal of the fuse box coupler R (28P).
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
